tools.name: analyze_document
tools.description: Analyze a document using Crucible™ Evidence Engine. Returns source-grounded findings with evidence, confidence, verification status, and routing metadata. Use specialized financial/contract tools when the domain is known.

tools.name: analyze_public_filing
tools.description: Crucible™ Financial Filing Intelligence for public filings and annual reports. Accepts content, filingUrl, or SEC ticker/CIK lookup for 10-K, 10-Q, and 20-F filings. Returns metrics, risk changes, contradictions, source evidence, confidence, and a not-investment-advice flag.

tools.name: review_contract_risks
tools.description: Crucible™ Contract Risk Intelligence for contracts, MSAs, NDAs, procurement agreements, and compliance documents. Extracts risk clauses, obligations, deadlines, liability exposure, missing terms, unusual clauses, evidence, and human-review flags. Not legal advice.

tools.name: extract_web
tools.description: Extract content from a web page URL, optionally analyzing it with the actor-critic pipeline. Works with static and server-rendered HTML pages.

tools.name: summarize
tools.description: Generate a concise summary with key points. Faster and cheaper than analyze_document — best for shorter documents.

tools.name: estimate_cost
tools.description: FREE: Estimate the x402 USDC cost of any tool or multi-step workflow before paying. Use this before calling paid tools to check pricing.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: FREE: Check service health, engine availability, and uptime. Use before dispatching paid calls to confirm the service is operational.

tools.name: delegate_bulk_translate
tools.description: Translate all string values in a JSON object or array to any target language. Preserves JSON structure, keys, and non-string values. Auto-chunks large payloads. Ideal for i18n locale files.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "estimate_cost" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: FREE: Estimate the x402 USDC cost of any tool or multi-step workflow before paying. Use this before calling paid tools to check pricing.

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
